stemHtml: When may the name of the location or the call sign suffix in the call sign of an aeronautical station be omitted?

options.a: Only after the aeronautical station has used the abbreviated call sign.
options.b: The call sign suffix should be used in radiotelephony communication under any circumstances when calling an aeronautical station.
options.c: When satisfactory communication has been established and provided it will not be confusing to do so.
options.d: In dense traffic during rush hours.
